name: Orange Poppyseed Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a screw-top jar.
2. If desired, slightly toast the poppy seeds for enhanced flavor (see note).
3. Shake vigorously until well combined.
4. Chill before serving.
5. Serve over a salad of Boston lettuce with melon and chopped prosciutto, or try it over slices of cold roast pork with nectarine wedges on watercress.
Note: For slightly toasted poppy seeds, place them in a 350°F (175°C) oven for about 5 minutes.
